intro: Every puzzle is a new destination!
description:
Journey across breathtaking destinations and stunning landscapes in Jigsaw Puzzle: Around the World, a relaxing jigsaw experience spanning the most spectacular places on Earth. Explore snow-capped mountain ranges, wander through sun-soaked city boulevards, and discover awe-inspiring worlds unlike any other!
The game features 30 handcrafted levels, each depicting a unique location filled with rich detail and atmosphere. Play using touch controls or controllers! With the built-in saving system, you can stop whenever you want and continue later without losing progress.
Designed for both short sessions and extended play, Jigsaw Puzzle: Around the World is perfect for relaxing on the go or unwinding at home.

Features:
› 30 handcrafted jigsaw levels spanning extraordinary destinations across the globe
› Diverse, richly illustrated artwork — from the golden forests of a mountain wilderness to the vibrant streets of a coastal city
› Touch controls and controller support, switch anytime
› Save and resume freely whenever you want
› A calm, immersive experience for all ages
